title: ARMA(p,q) Process Generation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the data generation process and components of a Mixed Autoregressive-Moving Average (ARMA) model, showing how past values and past error terms combine to produce the current observation.
relationships: Past observations feed into the AR component
Past error terms feed into the MA component
AR and MA components sum together to form Y_t
Current error term is added as an independent shock
